var(--transition-fast);}\n.gnb-icon:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.gnb-avatar{width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--color-primary-100);color:var(--color-interactive-primary);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:600;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}\n\n/* Sidebar */\n.sidebar{position:fixed;top:var(--gnb-height);left:0;bottom:0;width:var(--sidebar-collapsed);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border-right:1px solid var(--color-border-default);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:var(--space-3);gap:var(--space-1);z-index:400;}\n.sidebar-item{width:44px;height:44px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-radius:var(--radius-md);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);transition:all var(--transition-fast);position:relative;}\n.sidebar-item:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.sidebar-item.active{color:var(--color-interactive-primary);background:var(--color-interactive-muted);}\n.sidebar-item.active::before{content:'';position:absolute;left:-10px;top:8px;bottom:8px;width:3px;border-radius:0 2px 2px 0;background:var(--color-interactive-primary);}\n.sidebar-tooltip{position:absolute;left:calc(100% + 12px);top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:var(--color-neutral-800);color:var(--color-text-inverse);font-size:var(--text-xs);padding:var(--space-1) var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity var(--transition-fast);}\n.sidebar-item:hover .sidebar-tooltip{opacity:1;}\n\n/* Layout */\n.app{min-height:100vh;}\n.layout-body{display:flex;padding-top:var(--gnb-height);}\n.main{flex:1;margin-left:var(--sidebar-collapsed);padding:var(--space-6) var(--space-8);max-width:1440px;}\n\n/* Buttons */\n.btn-primary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-interactive-primary);color:var(--color-text-inverse);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:600;transition:background var(--transition-fast);}\n.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--color-interactive-hover);}\n.btn-secondary{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);border:1px solid var(--color-border-strong);color:var(--color-text-primary);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;transition:all var(--transition-fast);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);}\n.btn-secondary:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);}\n.btn-destructive{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-status-error);color:var(--color-text-inverse);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:600;transition:background var(--transition-fast);}\n.btn-destructive:hover{background:var(--color-error-600);}\n.btn-danger-outline{color:var(--color-status-error);border-color:var(--color-error-border);}\n.btn-danger-outline:hover{background:var(--color-status-error-bg);border-color:var(--color-status-error);}\n.btn-ghost{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-1);padding:var(--space-1) var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary);transition:all var(--transition-fast);}\n.btn-ghost:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.btn-sm{padding:var(--space-1) var(--space-3);font-size:var(--text-xs);}\n\n/* Filter */\n.filter-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-3);flex-wrap:wrap;padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);margin-bottom:var(--space-4);}\n.filter-select{padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-8) var(--space-2) var(--space-3);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);min-width:120px;appearance:none;background-image:url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg stroke-linecap='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:right 10px center;}\n.filter-select:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n.filter-input{padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-3);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);min-width:200px;}\n.filter-input:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n\n/* Table */\n.data-table-wrap{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;}\n.data-table th{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);text-align:left;font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.03em;background:var(--color-bg-surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);}\n.data-table td{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);font-size:var(--text-sm);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);vertical-align:middle;}\n.data-table tbody tr{cursor:pointer;transition:background var(--transition-fast);}\n.data-table tbody tr:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);}\n.data-table tbody tr:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--color-focus-ring);outline-offset:-2px;background:var(--color-bg-hover);}\n.data-table tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}\n.cell-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.cell-sub{color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.cell-meta{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}\n\n/* Badges */\n.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-1);padding:2px var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;}\n.badge-online{background:var(--color-status-success-bg);color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.badge-offline{background:var(--color-status-error-bg);color:var(--color-status-error);}\n.badge-active{background:var(--color-status-success-bg);color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.badge-inactive{background:var(--color-status-warning-bg);color:var(--color-warning-600);}\n.badge-unlinked{background:var(--color-neutral-200);color:var(--color-neutral-600);}\n.badge-archived{background:var(--color-neutral-200);color:var(--color-neutral-400);}\n.badge-lcd{background:var(--color-info-50);color:var(--color-info-500);}\n.badge-led{background:var(--color-warning-50);color:var(--color-warning-600);}\n\n/* Summary */\n.summary-widget{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:var(--space-4);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);}\n.summary-card{background:var(--color-bg-surface);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-4) var(--space-5);cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow var(--transition-fast);}\n.summary-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}\n.summary-card-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-1);}\n.summary-card-value{font-size:var(--text-2xl);font-weight:700;color:var(--color-interactive-primary);}\n\n/* Health dot */\n.health-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;flex-shrink:0;}\n.health-dot.online{background:var(--color-status-success);}\n.health-dot.offline{background:var(--color-status-error);animation:pulse 2s infinite;}\n@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.4;}}\n\n/* Page header */\n.page-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.page-title{font-size:var(--text-xl);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.02em;}\n.toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:var(--space-3);}\n.toolbar-count{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.toolbar-count strong{color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n\n/* Breadcrumb */\n.breadcrumb{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n.breadcrumb a{color:var(--color-interactive-primary);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}\n.breadcrumb a:hover{text-decoration:underline;}\n\n/* View states */\n.view{display:none;}.view.active{display:block;}\n\n/* Tabs */\n.tab-nav{display:flex;gap:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);}\n.tab-nav-item{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-5);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px;transition:all var(--transition-fast);}\n.tab-nav-item:hover{color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.tab-nav-item.active{color:var(--color-interactive-primary);border-bottom-color:var(--color-interactive-primary);font-weight:600;}\n\n/* Form */\n.form-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.form-card-title{font-size:var(--text-md);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);letter-spacing:-0.01em;}\n.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-5);}\n.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:var(--space-1);}\n.form-group.full-width{grid-column:1/-1;}\n.form-label{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.form-label .required{color:var(--color-status-error);}\n.form-control{padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-3);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);transition:border-color var(--transition-fast);}\n.form-control:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n.form-hint{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);margin-top:var(--space-1);}\n\n/* Detail layout */\n.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-4);}\n.detail-field-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:2px;}\n.detail-field-value{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;}\n\n/* Monitor card */\n.monitor-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:var(--space-4);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.monitor-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-4);text-align:center;}\n.monitor-card-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-2);}\n.monitor-card-value{font-size:var(--text-lg);font-weight:700;}\n.monitor-card-value.ok{color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.monitor-card-value.warn{color:var(--color-status-warning);}\n.monitor-card-value.error{color:var(--color-status-error);}\n\n/* Temp bar */\n.temp-bar{height:6px;background:var(--color-neutral-200);border-radius:3px;margin-top:var(--space-2);overflow:hidden;}\n.temp-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width var(--transition-normal);}\n.temp-bar-fill.ok{background:var(--color-status-success);}\n.temp-bar-fill.warn{background:var(--color-status-warning);}\n\n/* Device link section */\n.device-link-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.device-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-3);padding:var(--space-4);background:var(--color-status-success-bg);border-radius:var(--radius-md);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.device-status.unlinked{background:var(--color-neutral-100);}\n\n/* Warn banner */\n.warn-banner{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-status-warning-bg);border:1px solid var(--color-warning-200);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-warning-700);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n\n/* Info banner */\n.info-banner{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-info-50);border:1px solid oklch(0.90 0.03 240);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-info-500);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n\n/* Meta row */\n.meta-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-5);}\n.meta-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:var(--space-2) 0;}\n.meta-row+.meta-row{border-top:1px solid var(--color-border-default);}\n.meta-row-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.meta-row-value{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;}\n\n/* Modal */\n.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:oklch(0 0 0/0.4);z-index:650;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity var(--transition-normal);}\n.modal-overlay.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;}\n.modal{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);max-width:420px;width:90%;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:scale(0.95);transition:transform var(--transition-normal);}\n.modal-overlay.active .modal{transform:scale(1);}\n.modal-title{font-size:var(--text-md);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:var(--space-3);}\n.modal-body{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);line-height:1.6;}\n.modal-body .warning-text{color:var(--color-status-error);font-weight:500;}\n.modal-actions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:var(--space-3);}\n\n/* Toast */\n.toast{position:fixed;bottom:var(--space-8);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);background:var(--color-neutral-900);color:var(--color-text-inverse);padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-5);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;z-index:700;opacity:0;transition:all var(--transition-normal);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}\n.toast.active{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}\n\n.icon{width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;}\n\n/* Lock indicator */\n.lock-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-1);padding:var(--space-1) var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;background:var(--color-primary-50);color:var(--color-primary-700);}\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"app\">\n  <header class=\"gnb\">\n    <div class=\"gnb-brand\">DOOH CMS <span>|</span> <span style=\"font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-size:var(--text-sm);\">시티미디어</span></div>\n    <div class=\"gnb-actions\">\n      <button class=\"gnb-icon\" title=\"알림\" class=\"detail-field-label\">플레이어 버전</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">v3.2.1</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">마지막 업데이트</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">04.01 03:15 (콜타임)</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">다음 콜타임</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">04.06 03:00 (예정)</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">리프레시 상태</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\"><span class=\"badge badge-online\">정상</span></div></div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n    </main>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- Deactivate Modal -->\n<div class=\"modal-overlay\" id=\"deactivate-modal\">\n  <div class=\"modal\" role=\"alertdialog\" aria-label=\"매체 비활성화 확인\">\n    <div class=\"modal-title\">매체 비활성화</div>\n    <div class=\"modal-body\">이 매체를 비활성화하시겠습니까?<br><span class=\"warning-text\">적용중 편성표 2건이 일시정지됩니다.</span><br>예약됨 편성표 1건은 시작일에 자동 일시정지됩니다.</div>\n    <div class=\"modal-actions\">\n      <button class=\"btn-secondary\" onclick=\"closeDeactivateModal()\">취소</button>\n      <button class=\"btn-destructive\" onclick=\"confirmDeactivate()\">비활성화</button>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"toast\" id=\"toast\" role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\"></div>\n\n<script>\nvar _lastFocused=null;\nfunction trapFocus(c){_lastFocused=document.activeElement;var f=c.querySelectorAll('button,[href],input:not([disabled]),select,textarea,[tabindex]:not([tabindex=\"-1\"])');if(!f.length)return;var first=f[0],last=f[f.length-1];first.focus();c._ft=function(e){if(e.key!=='Tab')return;if(e.shiftKey){if(document.activeElement===first){e.preventDefault();last.focus();}}else{if(document.activeElement===last){e.preventDefault();first.focus();}}};c.addEventListener('keydown',c._ft);}\nfunction releaseFocus(c){if(c._ft){c.removeEventListener('keydown',c._ft);delete c._ft;}if(_lastFocused){_lastFocused.focus();_lastFocused=null;}}\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key!=='Escape')return;var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');if(m.classList.contains('active')){closeDeactivateModal();}});\n\nfunction hideAllViews(){document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(function(v){v.classList.remove('active');});}\nfunction showMediaList(){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-list').classList.add('active');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\nfunction showMediaRegister(){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-register').classList.add('active');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\nfunction showMediaDetail(id){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-detail').classList.add('active');switchDetailTab('info');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\n\nfunction switchDetailTab(tab){\n  document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item').forEach(function(t){t.classList.remove('active');});\n  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(function(c){c.style.display='none';});\n  if(tab==='info'){document.getElementById('tab-info').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[0].classList.add('active');}\n  else if(tab==='device'){document.getElementById('tab-device').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[1].classList.add('active');}\n  else{document.getElementById('tab-monitor').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[2].classList.add('active');}\n}\n\nfunction openDeactivateModal(){var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');m.classList.add('active');trapFocus(m);}\nfunction closeDeactivateModal(){var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');m.classList.remove('active');releaseFocus(m);}\nfunction confirmDeactivate(){closeDeactivateModal();showToast('매체가 비활성화되었습니다. 편성표 2건이 일시정지됩니다.');}\n\nfunction showToast(msg){var t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('active');setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('active');},2500);}\n</script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
}

  "description": "Commit media management prototype"
}

var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);min-width:120px;appearance:none;background-image:url(\"data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg width='10' height='6' viewBox='0 0 10 6' fill='none' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cpath d='M1 1L5 5L9 1' stroke='%23999' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-linecap='round'/%3E%3C/svg%3E\");background-repeat:no-repeat;background-position:right 10px center;}\n.filter-select:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n.filter-input{padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-3);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);min-width:200px;}\n.filter-input:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);outline:2px solid color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n\n/* Table */\n.data-table-wrap{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);overflow:hidden;}\n.data-table th{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);text-align:left;font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-secondary);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.03em;background:var(--color-bg-surface);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);}\n.data-table td{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);font-size:var(--text-sm);border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);vertical-align:middle;}\n.data-table tbody tr{cursor:pointer;transition:background var(--transition-fast);}\n.data-table tbody tr:hover{background:var(--color-bg-hover);}\n.data-table tbody tr:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--color-focus-ring);outline-offset:-2px;background:var(--color-bg-hover);}\n.data-table tbody tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}\n.cell-name{font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.cell-sub{color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.cell-meta{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}\n\n/* Badges */\n.badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-1);padding:2px var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;}\n.badge-online{background:var(--color-status-success-bg);color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.badge-offline{background:var(--color-status-error-bg);color:var(--color-status-error);}\n.badge-active{background:var(--color-status-success-bg);color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.badge-inactive{background:var(--color-status-warning-bg);color:var(--color-warning-600);}\n.badge-unlinked{background:var(--color-neutral-200);color:var(--color-neutral-600);}\n.badge-archived{background:var(--color-neutral-200);color:var(--color-neutral-400);}\n.badge-lcd{background:var(--color-info-50);color:var(--color-info-500);}\n.badge-led{background:var(--color-warning-50);color:var(--color-warning-600);}\n\n/* Summary */\n.summary-widget{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:var(--space-4);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);}\n.summary-card{background:var(--color-bg-surface);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-4) var(--space-5);cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow var(--transition-fast);}\n.summary-card:hover{box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}\n.summary-card-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-1);}\n.summary-card-value{font-size:var(--text-2xl);font-weight:700;color:var(--color-interactive-primary);}\n\n/* Health dot */\n.health-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;flex-shrink:0;}\n.health-dot.online{background:var(--color-status-success);}\n.health-dot.offline{background:var(--color-status-error);animation:pulse 2s infinite;}\n@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.4;}}\n\n/* Page header */\n.page-header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.page-title{font-size:var(--text-xl);font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-0.02em;}\n.toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:var(--space-3);}\n.toolbar-count{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.toolbar-count strong{color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n\n/* Breadcrumb */\n.breadcrumb{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n.breadcrumb a{color:var(--color-interactive-primary);cursor:pointer;text-decoration:none;}\n.breadcrumb a:hover{text-decoration:underline;}\n\n/* View states */\n.view{display:none;}.view.active{display:block;}\n\n/* Tabs */\n.tab-nav{display:flex;gap:0;border-bottom:1px solid var(--color-border-default);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);}\n.tab-nav-item{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-5);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary);border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-1px;transition:all var(--transition-fast);}\n.tab-nav-item:hover{color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.tab-nav-item.active{color:var(--color-interactive-primary);border-bottom-color:var(--color-interactive-primary);font-weight:600;}\n\n/* Form */\n.form-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.form-card-title{font-size:var(--text-md);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);letter-spacing:-0.01em;}\n.form-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-5);}\n.form-group{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:var(--space-1);}\n.form-group.full-width{grid-column:1/-1;}\n.form-label{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:600;color:var(--color-text-primary);}\n.form-label .required{color:var(--color-status-error);}\n.form-control{padding:var(--space-2) var(--space-3);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);background:var(--color-bg-elevated);transition:border-color var(--transition-fast);}\n.form-control:focus{border-color:var(--color-focus-ring);box-shadow:0 0 0 2px color-mix(in oklch,var(--color-focus-ring),transparent 85%);}\n.form-hint{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);margin-top:var(--space-1);}\n\n/* Detail layout */\n.detail-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-4);}\n.detail-field-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:2px;}\n.detail-field-value{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;}\n\n/* Monitor card */\n.monitor-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:var(--space-4);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.monitor-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-4);text-align:center;}\n.monitor-card-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-2);}\n.monitor-card-value{font-size:var(--text-lg);font-weight:700;}\n.monitor-card-value.ok{color:var(--color-status-success);}\n.monitor-card-value.warn{color:var(--color-status-warning);}\n.monitor-card-value.error{color:var(--color-status-error);}\n\n/* Temp bar */\n.temp-bar{height:6px;background:var(--color-neutral-200);border-radius:3px;margin-top:var(--space-2);overflow:hidden;}\n.temp-bar-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width var(--transition-normal);}\n.temp-bar-fill.ok{background:var(--color-status-success);}\n.temp-bar-fill.warn{background:var(--color-status-warning);}\n\n/* Device link section */\n.device-link-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.device-status{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-3);padding:var(--space-4);background:var(--color-status-success-bg);border-radius:var(--radius-md);margin-bottom:var(--space-5);}\n.device-status.unlinked{background:var(--color-neutral-100);}\n\n/* Warn banner */\n.warn-banner{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-status-warning-bg);border:1px solid var(--color-warning-200);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-warning-700);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n\n/* Info banner */\n.info-banner{padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-4);border-radius:var(--radius-md);background:var(--color-info-50);border:1px solid oklch(0.90 0.03 240);font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-info-500);font-weight:500;margin-bottom:var(--space-4);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);}\n\n/* Meta row */\n.meta-card{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border:1px solid var(--color-border-default);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-5);}\n.meta-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:var(--space-2) 0;}\n.meta-row+.meta-row{border-top:1px solid var(--color-border-default);}\n.meta-row-label{font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);}\n.meta-row-value{font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;}\n\n/* Modal */\n.modal-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:oklch(0 0 0/0.4);z-index:650;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;transition:opacity var(--transition-normal);}\n.modal-overlay.active{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;}\n.modal{background:var(--color-bg-elevated);border-radius:var(--radius-lg);padding:var(--space-6);max-width:420px;width:90%;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);transform:scale(0.95);transition:transform var(--transition-normal);}\n.modal-overlay.active .modal{transform:scale(1);}\n.modal-title{font-size:var(--text-md);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:var(--space-3);}\n.modal-body{font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--color-text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-6);line-height:1.6;}\n.modal-body .warning-text{color:var(--color-status-error);font-weight:500;}\n.modal-actions{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:var(--space-3);}\n\n/* Toast */\n.toast{position:fixed;bottom:var(--space-8);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(80px);background:var(--color-neutral-900);color:var(--color-text-inverse);padding:var(--space-3) var(--space-5);border-radius:var(--radius-md);font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:500;z-index:700;opacity:0;transition:all var(--transition-normal);box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}\n.toast.active{opacity:1;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}\n\n.icon{width:18px;height:18px;flex-shrink:0;}\n\n/* Lock indicator */\n.lock-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-1);padding:var(--space-1) var(--space-2);border-radius:var(--radius-sm);font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;background:var(--color-primary-50);color:var(--color-primary-700);}\n</style>\n</head>\n<body>\n\n<div class=\"app\">\n  <header class=\"gnb\">\n    <div class=\"gnb-brand\">DOOH CMS <span>|</span> <span style=\"font-weight:500;color:var(--color-text-secondary);font-size:var(--text-sm);\">시티미디어</span></div>\n    <div class=\"gnb-actions\">\n      <button class=\"gnb-icon\" title=\"알림\" aria-label=\"알림\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" stroke-linecap=\"round\" stroke-linejoin=\"round\"><path d=\"M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9\"/><path d=\"M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0\"/></svg></button>\n      <div class=\"gnb-avatar\">최</div>\n    </div>\n  </header>\n\n  <div class=\"layout-body\">\n    <nav class=\"sidebar\">\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item\" aria-label=\"대시보드\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><rect x=\"3\" y=\"3\" width=\"7\" height=\"7\"/><rect x=\"14\" y=\"3\" width=\"7\" height=\"7\"/><rect x=\"14\" y=\"14\" width=\"7\" height=\"7\"/><rect x=\"3\" y=\"14\" width=\"7\" height=\"7\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">대시보드</span></button>\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item\" aria-label=\"소재 관리\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"m22 8-6 4 6 4V8Z\"/><rect x=\"1\" y=\"5\" width=\"15\" height=\"14\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">소재 관리</span></button>\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item\" aria-label=\"편성 관리\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><rect x=\"3\" y=\"4\" width=\"18\" height=\"18\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"6\"/><line x1=\"8\" y1=\"2\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"6\"/><line x1=\"3\" y1=\"10\" x2=\"21\" y2=\"10\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">편성 관리</span></button>\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item active\" aria-label=\"매체 관리\" aria-current=\"page\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><rect x=\"2\" y=\"3\" width=\"20\" height=\"14\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"/><line x1=\"8\" y1=\"21\" x2=\"16\" y2=\"21\"/><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"17\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"21\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">매체 관리</span></button>\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item\" aria-label=\"캠페인\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><polygon points=\"12 2 15.09 8.26 22 9.27 17 14.14 18.18 21.02 12 17.77 5.82 21.02 7 14.14 2 9.27 8.91 8.26 12 2\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">캠페인</span></button>\n      <button class=\"sidebar-item\" aria-label=\"리포트\"><svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\" aria-hidden=\"true\"><path d=\"M14 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V8z\"/><polyline points=\"14 2 14 8 20 8\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"13\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"13\"/><line x1=\"16\" y1=\"17\" x2=\"8\" y2=\"17\"/></svg><span class=\"sidebar-tooltip\">리포트</span></button>\n    </nav>\n\n    <main class=\"main\">\n\n      <!-- ===== S-06: 매체 목록 ===== -->\n      <div id=\"view-media-list\" class=\"view active\">\n        <div class=\"summary-widget\">\n          <div class=\"summary-card\"><div class=\"summary-card-label\">연동됨 (활성)</div><div class=\"summary-card-value\">3</div></div>\n          <div class=\"summary-card\"><div class=\"summary-card-label\">연동됨 (비활성)</div><div class=\"summary-card-value\" style=\"color:var(--color-status-warning);\">1</div></div>\n          <div class=\"summary-card\"><div class=\"summary-card-label\">미연동</div><div class=\"summary-card-value\" style=\"color:var(--color-text-tertiary);\">1</div></div>\n          <div class=\"summary-card\"><div class=\"summary-card-label\">오프라인</div><div class=\"summary-card-value\" style=\"color:var(--color-status-error);\">1</div></div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"page-header\">\n          <h1 class=\"page-title\">매체 관리</h1>\n          <button class=\"btn-primary\" onclick=\"showMediaRegister()\">\n            <svg class=\"icon\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2.5\" stroke-linecap=\"round\"><line x1=\"12\" y1=\"5\" x2=\"12\" y2=\"19\"/><line x1=\"5\" y1=\"12\" x2=\"19\" y2=\"12\"/></svg>\n            매체 등록\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"filter-bar\">\n          <select class=\"filter-select\"><option value=\"\">매체 상태</option><option>연동됨(활성)</option><option>연동됨(비활성)</option><option>미연동</option><option>보관됨</option></select>\n          <select class=\"filter-select\"><option value=\"\">연결 상태</option><option>온라인</option><option>오프라인</option></select>\n          <select class=\"filter-select\"><option value=\"\">디스플레이</option><option>LCD</option><option>LED</option></select>\n          <input type=\"text\" class=\"filter-input\" placeholder=\"매체명 검색...\">\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"toolbar\"><span class=\"toolbar-count\">전체 <strong>6건</strong></span></div>\n\n        <div class=\"data-table-wrap\">\n          <table class=\"data-table\">\n            <thead><tr><th>매체명</th><th>설치 위치</th><th>디스플레이</th><th>해상도</th><th>운영 시간</th><th>연결</th><th>매체 상태</th></tr></thead>\n            <tbody>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" onclick=\"showMediaDetail('gangnam')\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();showMediaDetail('gangnam')}\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\"><span class=\"health-dot online\"></span> 강남역 1번출구</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 강남구 강남대로 396</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-lcd\">LCD</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">1920×1080</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">06:00 ~ 24:00</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-online\">온라인</span></td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-active\">연동됨(활성)</span></td>\n              </tr>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" onclick=\"showMediaDetail('jongro')\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();showMediaDetail('jongro')}\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\"><span class=\"health-dot online\"></span> 종로 전광판</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 종로구 종로 1</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-led\">LED</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">3840×1080</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">00:00 ~ 24:00</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-online\">온라인</span></td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-active\">연동됨(활성)</span></td>\n              </tr>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" onclick=\"showMediaDetail('hongdae')\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();showMediaDetail('hongdae')}\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\"><span class=\"health-dot offline\"></span> 홍대입구 A</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 마포구 양화로 160</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-lcd\">LCD</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">1920×1080</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">06:00 ~ 24:00</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-offline\">오프라인</span></td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-active\">연동됨(활성)</span></td>\n              </tr>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" onclick=\"showMediaDetail('sinchon')\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();showMediaDetail('sinchon')}\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\"><span class=\"health-dot online\"></span> 신촌 B</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 서대문구 연세로 12</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-lcd\">LCD</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">1920×1080</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">08:00 ~ 22:00</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-online\">온라인</span></td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-inactive\">연동됨(비활성)</span></td>\n              </tr>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" onclick=\"showMediaDetail('yeouido')\" onkeydown=\"if(event.key==='Enter'||event.key===' '){event.preventDefault();showMediaDetail('yeouido')}\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\">여의도 C</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 영등포구 여의대로 24</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-led\">LED</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">3840×2160</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">24시간</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">—</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-unlinked\">미연동</span></td>\n              </tr>\n              <tr tabindex=\"0\" style=\"opacity:0.5\">\n                <td class=\"cell-name\">잠실 D</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-sub\">서울 송파구 올림픽로 300</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-lcd\">LCD</span></td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">1920×1080</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">—</td>\n                <td class=\"cell-meta\">—</td>\n                <td><span class=\"badge badge-archived\">보관됨</span></td>\n              </tr>\n            </tbody>\n          </table>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- ===== S-07: 매체 등록 ===== -->\n      <div id=\"view-media-register\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"breadcrumb\"><a onclick=\"showMediaList()\">매체 관리</a><span>&rsaquo;</span><span>매체 등록</span></div>\n        <div class=\"page-header\"><h1 class=\"page-title\">매체 등록</h1></div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-card\">\n          <div class=\"form-card-title\">기본 정보</div>\n          <div class=\"form-grid\">\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">매체명 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><input type=\"text\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder=\"매체명을 입력하세요\"></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">매체 종류 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><select class=\"form-control\"><option>고정형</option><option>이동형</option></select></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">설치 주소 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><input type=\"text\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder=\"주소 검색\"></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">설치 형태 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><select class=\"form-control\"><option>가로형</option><option>세로형</option></select></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-card\">\n          <div class=\"form-card-title\">디스플레이 설정</div>\n          <div class=\"form-grid\">\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">디스플레이 유형 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><select class=\"form-control\"><option>LCD</option><option>LED</option><option>기타 (직접입력)</option></select></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">화면 사이즈 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><input type=\"text\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder='예: 55\"'></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">해상도 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><select class=\"form-control\"><option>1920×1080 (16:9)</option><option>3840×1080 (32:9)</option><option>3840×2160 (16:9)</option></select></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">허용 해상도 <span class=\"required\">*</span></label><input type=\"text\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder=\"예: 1920×1080, 1280×720\" value=\"1920×1080\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"form-card\">\n          <div class=\"form-card-title\">운영 시간</div>\n          <div class=\"form-grid\">\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">운영 요일</label><select class=\"form-control\"><option>매일</option><option>평일</option><option>주말</option><option>직접 선택</option></select></div>\n            <div class=\"form-group\"><label class=\"form-label\">운영 시간</label>\n              <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-2);\"><input type=\"time\" class=\"form-control\" value=\"06:00\"><span style=\"color:var(--color-text-tertiary);\">~</span><input type=\"time\" class=\"form-control\" value=\"24:00\"></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"form-group full-width\"><label class=\"form-label\">비고</label><input type=\"text\" class=\"form-control\" placeholder=\"비고 입력 (선택)\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div style=\"display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);\">\n          <button class=\"btn-primary\" onclick=\"showToast('매체가 등록되었습니다. 매체 식별 코드: MED-2026-007')\">등록</button>\n          <button class=\"btn-secondary\" onclick=\"showMediaList()\">취소</button>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n      <!-- ===== S-08: 매체 상세 (강남역 1번출구) ===== -->\n      <div id=\"view-media-detail\" class=\"view\">\n        <div class=\"breadcrumb\"><a onclick=\"showMediaList()\">매체 관리</a><span>&rsaquo;</span><span id=\"detail-media-name\">강남역 1번출구</span></div>\n\n        <div class=\"tab-nav\" id=\"detail-tabs\">\n          <button class=\"tab-nav-item active\" onclick=\"switchDetailTab('info')\">기본 정보</button>\n          <button class=\"tab-nav-item\" onclick=\"switchDetailTab('device')\">디바이스 연동</button>\n          <button class=\"tab-nav-item\" onclick=\"switchDetailTab('monitor')\">모니터링</button>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Tab: 기본 정보 -->\n        <div id=\"tab-info\" class=\"tab-content\">\n          <div style=\"display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 340px;gap:var(--space-6);\">\n            <div class=\"form-card\" style=\"margin-bottom:0;\">\n              <div class=\"form-card-title\">기본 정보</div>\n              <div class=\"detail-grid\">\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">매체명</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">강남역 1번출구</div></div>\n                <div><div 강남대로 396</div></div>\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">설치 형태</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">가로형</div></div>\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">디스플레이</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">LCD · 55\" · 1920×1080</div></div>\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">운영 시간</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">매일 06:00 ~ 24:00</div></div>\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">매체 식별 코드</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\" style=\"font-family:var(--font-mono);\">MED-2026-001</div></div>\n                <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">등록일</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">2026.03.15</div></div>\n              </div>\n              <div style=\"margin-top:var(--space-5);display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);\">\n                <button class=\"btn-secondary\" onclick=\"showToast('수정 모드로 전환합니다.')\">수정</button>\n                <button class=\"btn-secondary btn-danger-outline\" onclick=\"openDeactivateModal()\">비활성화</button>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <div class=\"meta-card\">\n                <div style=\"font-size:var(--text-md);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:var(--space-3);\">매체 상태</div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">상태</span><span class=\"badge badge-active\">연동됨(활성)</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">연결</span><span class=\"badge badge-online\">온라인</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">디바이스 ID</span><span class=\"meta-row-value\" style=\"font-family:var(--font-mono);\">DVS-KR-GN-001</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">최근 통신</span><span class=\"meta-row-value\">04.05 14:32 (3분 전)</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">플레이어 버전</span><span class=\"meta-row-value\">v3.2.1</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">SSP 연동</span><span class=\"meta-row-value\" style=\"color:var(--color-text-tertiary);\">미설정</span></div>\n                <div class=\"meta-row\"><span class=\"meta-row-label\">편성표</span><span class=\"meta-row-value\">적용중 2건</span></div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Tab: 디바이스 연동 -->\n        <div id=\"tab-device\" class=\"tab-content\" style=\"display:none;\">\n          <div class=\"device-link-card\">\n            <div class=\"form-card-title\">디바이스 연동</div>\n            <div class=\"device-status\">\n              <span class=\"health-dot online\"></span>\n              <div><div style=\"font-weight:600;font-size:var(--text-sm);\">연동 완료</div><div style=\"font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-secondary);\">DVS-KR-GN-001 · 2026.03.16 연동</div></div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div class=\"form-card-title\" style=\"margin-top:var(--space-4);\">영상 출력 조정</div>\n            <div class=\"detail-grid\" style=\"margin-bottom:var(--space-4);\">\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">X 오프셋</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">0 px</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">Y 오프셋</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">0 px</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">너비</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">1920 px</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">높이</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">1080 px</div></div>\n            </div>\n            <div style=\"display:flex;align-items:center;gap:var(--space-3);\">\n              <span class=\"lock-badge\">\n                <svg width=\"14\" height=\"14\" viewBox=\"0 0 24 24\" fill=\"none\" stroke=\"currentColor\" stroke-width=\"2\"><rect x=\"3\" y=\"11\" width=\"18\" height=\"11\" rx=\"2\" ry=\"2\"/><path d=\"M7 11V7a5 5 0 0 1 10 0v4\"/></svg>\n                잠금됨\n              </span>\n              <button class=\"btn-ghost btn-sm\" onclick=\"showToast('잠금이 해제되었습니다. 방향키로 조정하세요.')\">잠금 해제</button>\n            </div>\n\n            <div style=\"margin-top:var(--space-6);border-top:1px solid var(--color-border-default);padding-top:var(--space-5);\">\n              <button class=\"btn-secondary btn-danger-outline\" onclick=\"showToast('디바이스 교체 모드로 전환합니다.')\">디바이스 교체</button>\n              <div class=\"form-hint\" style=\"margin-top:var(--space-2);\">기존 연동을 해제하고 새 디바이스를 연동합니다. 편성표는 유지됩니다.</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <!-- Tab: 모니터링 -->\n        <div id=\"tab-monitor\" class=\"tab-content\" style=\"display:none;\">\n          <div class=\"monitor-grid\">\n            <div class=\"monitor-card\">\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-label\">연결 상태</div>\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-value ok\">온라인</div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"monitor-card\">\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-label\">CPU 온도</div>\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-value ok\">42°C</div>\n              <div class=\"temp-bar\"><div class=\"temp-bar-fill ok\" style=\"width:42%;\"></div></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"monitor-card\">\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-label\">GPU 온도</div>\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-value warn\">68°C</div>\n              <div class=\"temp-bar\"><div class=\"temp-bar-fill warn\" style=\"width:68%;\"></div></div>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"monitor-card\">\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-label\">최근 통신</div>\n              <div class=\"monitor-card-value\" style=\"font-size:var(--text-sm);\">04.05 14:32</div>\n              <div style=\"font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--color-text-tertiary);margin-top:var(--space-1);\">3분 전</div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"form-card\">\n            <div class=\"form-card-title\">편성 동기화 상태</div>\n            <div class=\"detail-grid\">\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">CMS 편성 버전</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\" style=\"font-family:var(--font-mono);\">v12</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">플레이어 보고 버전</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\" style=\"font-family:var(--font-mono);\">v12</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">동기화</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\"><span class=\"badge badge-online\">일치</span></div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">마지막 동기화</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">04.05 09:05</div></div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div class=\"form-card\">\n            <div class=\"form-card-title\">플레이어 정보</div>\n            <div class=\"detail-grid\">\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">플레이어 버전</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">v3.2.1</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">마지막 업데이트</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">04.01 03:15 (콜타임)</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">다음 콜타임</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\">04.06 03:00 (예정)</div></div>\n              <div><div class=\"detail-field-label\">리프레시 상태</div><div class=\"detail-field-value\"><span class=\"badge badge-online\">정상</span></div></div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n\n    </main>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<!-- Deactivate Modal -->\n<div class=\"modal-overlay\" id=\"deactivate-modal\">\n  <div class=\"modal\" role=\"alertdialog\" aria-label=\"매체 비활성화 확인\">\n    <div class=\"modal-title\">매체 비활성화</div>\n    <div class=\"modal-body\">이 매체를 비활성화하시겠습니까?<br><span class=\"warning-text\">적용중 편성표 2건이 일시정지됩니다.</span><br>예약됨 편성표 1건은 시작일에 자동 일시정지됩니다.</div>\n    <div class=\"modal-actions\">\n      <button class=\"btn-secondary\" onclick=\"closeDeactivateModal()\">취소</button>\n      <button class=\"btn-destructive\" onclick=\"confirmDeactivate()\">비활성화</button>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n<div class=\"toast\" id=\"toast\" role=\"status\" aria-live=\"polite\"></div>\n\n<script>\nvar _lastFocused=null;\nfunction trapFocus(c){_lastFocused=document.activeElement;var f=c.querySelectorAll('button,[href],input:not([disabled]),select,textarea,[tabindex]:not([tabindex=\"-1\"])');if(!f.length)return;var first=f[0],last=f[f.length-1];first.focus();c._ft=function(e){if(e.key!=='Tab')return;if(e.shiftKey){if(document.activeElement===first){e.preventDefault();last.focus();}}else{if(document.activeElement===last){e.preventDefault();first.focus();}}};c.addEventListener('keydown',c._ft);}\nfunction releaseFocus(c){if(c._ft){c.removeEventListener('keydown',c._ft);delete c._ft;}if(_lastFocused){_lastFocused.focus();_lastFocused=null;}}\ndocument.addEventListener('keydown',function(e){if(e.key!=='Escape')return;var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');if(m.classList.contains('active')){closeDeactivateModal();}});\n\nfunction hideAllViews(){document.querySelectorAll('.view').forEach(function(v){v.classList.remove('active');});}\nfunction showMediaList(){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-list').classList.add('active');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\nfunction showMediaRegister(){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-register').classList.add('active');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\nfunction showMediaDetail(id){hideAllViews();document.getElementById('view-media-detail').classList.add('active');switchDetailTab('info');window.scrollTo(0,0);}\n\nfunction switchDetailTab(tab){\n  document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item').forEach(function(t){t.classList.remove('active');});\n  document.querySelectorAll('.tab-content').forEach(function(c){c.style.display='none';});\n  if(tab==='info'){document.getElementById('tab-info').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[0].classList.add('active');}\n  else if(tab==='device'){document.getElementById('tab-device').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[1].classList.add('active');}\n  else{document.getElementById('tab-monitor').style.display='';document.querySelectorAll('#detail-tabs .tab-nav-item')[2].classList.add('active');}\n}\n\nfunction openDeactivateModal(){var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');m.classList.add('active');trapFocus(m);}\nfunction closeDeactivateModal(){var m=document.getElementById('deactivate-modal');m.classList.remove('active');releaseFocus(m);}\nfunction confirmDeactivate(){closeDeactivateModal();showToast('매체가 비활성화되었습니다. 편성표 2건이 일시정지됩니다.');}\n\nfunction showToast(msg){var t=document.getElementById('toast');t.textContent=msg;t.classList.add('active');setTimeout(function(){t.classList.remove('active');},2500);}\n</script>\n</body>\n</html>\n"
```json
}
```

Korean-language enterprise admin interface for managing digital signage displays.\n\nThe page has multiple views accessible via JS:\n- Default: media list (S-06) — summary widget, health dots, status badges\n- showMediaRegister(): media registration form (S-07) — 3 sections\n- showMediaDetail('gangnam'): media detail (S-08) with 3 tabs:\n  - switchDetailTab('info'): basic info + status card\n  - switchDetailTab('device'): device linking, display calibration, lock\n  - switchDetailTab('monitor'): CPU/GPU temps, sync status, player info\n\nReference scores from other prototypes: AI Slop 4/4, Nielsen 33/40, Audit 17/20.\n\n## Evaluation Protocol\n\n### Step 1: Take Screenshots\nNavigate to URL, then for each view:\n1. **Summary of scores:**

| Metric | Score | Band |
|--------|-------|------|
| AI Slop | **4/4 PASS** | No tells detected |
| Nielsen Heuristics | **32/40** | Good |
| Audit Health | **17/20** | Good |

These scores are consistent with the reference prototype benchmarks (AI Slop 4/4, Nielsen 33/40, Audit 17/20). The media management screen scores 1 point lower on Nielsen (mainly due to the lack of keyboard shortcuts and bulk operations pulling Heuristic 7 to a 2), and matches the audit score.

**Top issues to address:**
- **P1-1**: Form `<label>` elements lack `for`/`id` association with inputs (WCAG violation) -- `media-management.html:339-363`
- **P1-2**: No form validation at all on the registration form -- `media-management.html:368`
- **P2-2/P2-3**: Summary and monitor grids need responsive breakpoints -- `media-management.html:116,167`
